race.comment: Looks a wide open affair. ACAPULCO GIRL (5) loves it here around the Ipswich circuit only missing a quinella spot once in five attempts. Grows a leg for hoop Maloney who has two wins and a placing from four steers and a return to form is on the cards. GOLDEN CROSS (15) has been plying his trade in harder Saturday metro grade and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Looms as the main danger. RUBYDOO (17) has placed three of four over this distance range and gets in well at the weights with the claim. In the mix. MR BUBBALUSKI (10) will be rock-hard fit for this and should get a cosy run in transit from gate three. Top-three prospects. SIR MAURICE (12) next in line despite the sticky draw.
